parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Script generation started', topic_id: $json.topic_id }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'scripting', script_attempts: $json.attempt, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Init & Validate Prompts').first().json.project_id, topic_id: $('Init & Validate Prompts').first().json.topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'started', details: { attempt: $('Init & Validate Prompts').first().json.attempt } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 8192, system: $('Init & Validate Prompts').first().json.project.niche_system_prompt || 'You are an expert scriptwriter for long-form YouTube documentaries.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 2048, system: 'You are a script quality evaluator. Always return valid JSON only, no markdown.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.eval_prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ script_pass_scores: $json.script_pass_scores, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Merge Pass 1 Scores').first().json.project_id, topic_id: $('Merge Pass 1 Scores').first().json.topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'pass1_complete', details: { score: $('Merge Pass 1 Scores').first().json.pass1_score, word_count: $('Merge Pass 1 Scores').first().json.pass1_text.split(' ').length } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 12288, system: $('Init & Validate Prompts').first().json.project.niche_system_prompt || 'You are an expert scriptwriter for long-form YouTube documentaries.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }, { role: 'assistant', content: $json.pass1_text }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ script_pass_scores: $json.script_pass_scores, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Merge Pass 2 Scores').first().json.project_id, topic_id: $('Merge Pass 2 Scores').first().json.topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'pass2_complete', details: { score: $('Merge Pass 2 Scores').first().json.pass2_score, word_count: $('Merge Pass 2 Scores').first().json.pass2_text.split(' ').length } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 8192, system: $('Init & Validate Prompts').first().json.project.niche_system_prompt || 'You are an expert scriptwriter for long-form YouTube documentaries.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ script_pass_scores: $json.script_pass_scores, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Merge Pass 3 Scores').first().json.project_id, topic_id: $('Merge Pass 3 Scores').first().json.topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'pass3_complete', details: { score: $('Merge Pass 3 Scores').first().json.pass3_score, word_count: $('Merge Pass 3 Scores').first().json.pass3_text.split(' ').length } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a script quality evaluator. Always return valid JSON only, no markdown.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.eval_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ script_quality_score: $json.combined_score, script_evaluation: JSON.stringify({ score: $json.combined_score, dimensions: $json.dimensions, feedback: $json.feedback, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }), script_pass_scores: $json.script_pass_scores, script_force_passed: $json.force_passed, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a visual director for YouTube documentaries. Assign visual types to scenes. Always return valid JSON only.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.visual_prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ script_json: $json.script_json, script_metadata: $json.script_metadata, word_count: $json.word_count, scene_count: $json.scene_count, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.script_json }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'review', script_review_status: 'pending', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.project_id, topic_id: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'completed', details: { word_count: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.word_count, scene_count: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.scene_count, quality_score: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.combined_score, force_passed: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.force_passed, attempt: $('Build Scenes Array').first().json.attempt } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'failed', error_log: $json.error_message, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Collect Error').first().json.project_id, topic_id: $('Collect Error').first().json.topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'failed', details: { error: $('Collect Error').first().json.error_message } }) }}
